data.title: Struggling Spirit Airlines to close down, seeking $500M bailout from Trump government.
data.description: The budget airline, which has faced challenges for an extended period, was in the process of seeking a $500 million financial assistance package from the Trump administration.

data.title: Reddit Rallies As Ad Growth Drowns Out User Miss
data.description: Shares of Reddit Inc (NYSE: RDDT) surged in early trading following the release of their positive first-quarter results. Industry analysts shared their insights on the company's performance. JPMorgan analyst Doug Anmuth maintained a Neutral rating and set a price target of $200. DA Davidson analyst Wyatt Swanson also kept a Buy rating with a price target of $200, while Needham analyst Laura Martin reaffirmed a Buy rating with a price target of $300. According to JPMorgan, Reddit added over 5 million daily active unique users (DAUq), aligning with expectations. The company aims to reach 100 million US DAUq eventually. Reddit's ad revenues increased by 74% year-on-year, marking the seventh consecutive quarter of over 60% growth. Additionally, active advertisers rose by 75% year-on-year. For further details, please refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cumulus Welcomes Revolution Group's Plex Practice, Forming the Leading Dedicated Plex Partner
data.description: Coming together to enhance customer experience and drive growth for manufacturers, two renowned Plex teams have joined forces in a strategic alliance. This collaboration aims to broaden the audience reach and maximize value creation. The merger, announced on May 1, 2026 in TROY, Mich., involves Cumulus Consulting and Plex by Rockwell Automation Smart Manufacturing. This partnership combines expertise from both teams to provide exceptional services to clients.

data.title: Ethereum ETFs lose $184M in 4-day slump, Bitcoin funds drop $490M amid S&P 500 record high.
data.description: For four consecutive days, Ethereum exchange-traded funds experienced continued outflows, while Bitcoin funds lost $490 million. Despite this, the S&P 500 reached a record high.

data.title: Automated Bike Lane Enforcement Begins in Santa Monica
data.description: Starting on May 1, 2026, the City of Santa Monica will initiate the automated enforcement of vehicles found parked unlawfully in bike lanes in the city. This marks the official commencement of the Automated Bike Lane Enforcement program in Santa Monica, operated in partnership with Hayden AI. Santa Monica stands out as the inaugural city in California to utilize camera technology installed on parking enforcement vehicles for the purpose of enforcing bike lane regulations. Violating vehicles that obstruct or stop in bike lanes pose a significant risk to cyclists, forcing them into lanes already occupied by moving vehicles, potentially leading to an increase in accidents and collisions.

data.title: Summit Therapeutics Stock Dips After Q1 Financial Report
data.description: Summit Therapeutics Inc (NASDAQ: SMMT) is experiencing a significant decline in its share value following the release of its first-quarter financial report. Despite reporting a Non-GAAP EPS loss of 15 cents, surpassing the estimated 18 cents loss, the company is facing bearish pressure due to increased spending, amplified losses, and a lack of immediate clinical developments. The Non-GAAP net loss has expanded to $(116.6) million from $(51.8) million in the previous year, with operating expenses soaring to $122.4 million, more than double the expenses from the prior year. These financial results have negatively impacted investor sentiment towards the company. For a more detailed account, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Corcept Therapeutics Pivotal Study Shows 87% Lower Death Risk
data.description: Shares of Corcept Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: CORT) saw an increase on Friday following the release of significant results from its Phase 2 DAZALS study. The study demonstrated an 87% decrease in the likelihood of death for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) patients compared to those on a placebo. Patients treated with 300 mg of dazucorilant daily experienced enhanced overall survival rates. ALS, also known as Lou Gehrig's disease, is a fatal progressive neurodegenerative condition that leads to the deterioration of motor neurons in the brain and spinal cord, resulting in voluntary muscle weakening, paralysis, and breathing difficulties. Despite not meeting its primary goal, the DAZALS trial showcased a survival advantage after the 24-week treatment period for patients.

data.title: PointsKash Expands Fintech Power with Keating Rewards Acquisition
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida on May 1, 2026, PointsKash, Inc., a fintech company specializing in payments, rewards, and digital financial services, revealed its purchase of Keating Software's rewards program development and reporting platform. The acquisition involved a payment in cash and stock.

data.title: Sanctuary Wealth Welcomes Iron North Private Wealth
data.description: A former wirehouse team with assets totaling $350 million is joining Sanctuary Wealth, a hybrid RIA based in Miami. This partnership marks Sanctuary's expansion into Idaho as it seeks to assist elite financial advisors in achieving success through enhanced freedom, flexibility, control, and choice. Iron North Private will now be a part of Sanctuary's growing network.
As of April 30, 2026, the total voting rights and shares in the share capital were disclosed.

data.title: Schwab partner stops donations to SPLC as Fidelity and Vanguard's entities also react to DOJ indictment.
data.description: The charitable fund organizations of Fidelity and Vanguard have both made corresponding decisions following an indictment by the Justice Department against the civil rights group.

data.title: KBRA Releases Research – CMBS Loan Performance Trends: April 2026
data.description: In New York, KBRA has issued a report on U.S. commercial mortgage-backed securities (CMBS) loan performance during the April 2026 servicer reporting period. The 30+ day delinquency rate for KBRA-rated U.S. private label CMBS dropped by 15 basis points to 7.6% in April compared to 7.7% in March. Additionally, the distress rate, which accounts for delinquent and current-but-specially-serviced loans, saw an 8 basis points decrease. Specifically, the multifamily sector showed improvements in distress levels.
